title: Middle Eastern Crumble Cheesecake
description: A tangy and sweet dessert that combines the flavors of the Middle East with a crumbly texture.
instructions: Prepare the crust by mixing together the crushed cookies, sugar, and flour in a bowl.
Add the spice blend and lemon zest to the bowl and stir to combine.
Press the mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
Beat the cream cheese and sugar in a separate bowl until smooth.
Add the vanilla extract and mix until combined.
Pour the cheesecake batter over the crust.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the edges are set and the center is slightly jiggly.
Let cool completely in the pan before serving.
Top with crumbled cheese and a sprinkle of sugar before serving.
